name: Chili Pie II
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounce, whole kernel corn, vacuum-packed can, drained
16 oz Can whole peeled tomatoes, undrained
1 1/2 cup Tortilla chips or corn chips, coarsely crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble meat into a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Add onions and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 7 minutes or until meat is browned and onions are tender. Stir occasionally.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Add corn, tomatoes, tomato sauce, chili powder to taste and salt and pepper. Stir to combine.
5. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Arrange olive slices on top of meat mixture and sprinkle with cheese.
7. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with tortilla chips and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 minute.
